mapper.select: SELECT uc.id AS userCouponId, c.id AS couponId, c.name, c.discount_type AS discountType, c.discount_value AS discountValue, c.min_order_amount AS minOrderAmount, c.max_discount_amount AS maxDiscountAmount, c.end_date AS endDate FROM `petlog`.user_coupon uc JOIN `petlog`.coupon c ON uc.coupon_id = c.id WHERE uc.user_id = #{userId} AND uc.status = 'AVAILABLE' AND (c.end_date IS NULL OR c.end_date > NOW()) ORDER BY c.discount_value DESC

SELECT uc.id AS userCouponId, uc.status, uc.used_at AS usedAt, c.name, c.discount_type AS discountType, c.discount_value AS discountValue, c.min_order_amount AS minOrderAmount, c.max_discount_amount AS maxDiscountAmount, c.end_date AS endDate FROM petlog.user_coupon uc JOIN petlog.coupon c ON uc.coupon_id = c.id WHERE uc.user_id = #{userId} AND (uc.status = 'USED' OR c.end_date <= NOW()) ORDER BY uc.used_at DESC
